homepage.heroSubline: Durable surfaces built to withstand Ohio's toughest conditions. Quality paving solutions for residential and commercial properties.
aboutText: Buckeye Surface Maintenance isn't just another paving company. We're Clevelanders, born and raised, and we understand the unique challenges our weather and infrastructure present. From the freeze-thaw cycles that crack asphalt to the lake effect snow that demands proper drainage, we've seen it all and paved through it.

Our approach is simple: honest work, quality materials, and unwavering dedication to our clients. We treat every project, big or small, as if it were for our own homes. We don't cut corners, and we stand behind our work, ensuring lasting results that stand the test of time.

We're deeply invested in the Cleveland community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local businesses, and actively participate in neighborhood improvement projects. When you choose Buckeye Surface Maintenance, you're choosing a partner who cares about Cleveland as much as you do.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Decades of experience tackling Cleveland's unique paving challenges.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use only the highest-grade asphalt and concrete for lasting durability.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: On-time project completion and clear communication throughout the process.

valueProps.title: Competitive Pricing
valueProps.description: Fair and transparent pricing with no hidden fees or surprises.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Buckeye Surface Maintenance today for a free estimate and expert consultation.

services.name: Asphalt Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and reliable asphalt paving solutions for driveways, parking lots, and more.
services.description:
Asphalt paving is a cost-effective and durable solution for a wide range of applications, from residential driveways in Tremont to commercial parking lots in Ohio City. Buckeye Surface Maintenance specializes in providing high-quality asphalt paving services that withstand Cleveland's harsh climate. Our experienced team ensures proper grading, compaction, and drainage to prevent cracking, potholes, and other common issues caused by freeze-thaw cycles and heavy traffic.

We use only the finest asphalt mixes, tailored to the specific needs of each project. Whether you need a new driveway installed, an existing parking lot resurfaced, or a complete asphalt paving solution for your business, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done right. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring a smooth, even surface that enhances the appearance and value of your property.

From initial consultation to final inspection, we're committed to providing exceptional customer service and lasting results. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your daily routine or business operations, so we work efficiently and effectively to complete projects on time and within budget.

faq.question: How long does asphalt paving last in Cleveland's climate?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, asphalt paving can last 15-20 years in Cleveland, even with our harsh winters.

faq.question: What is the best time of year for asphalt paving?
faq.answer: The ideal time for asphalt paving in Cleveland is during the warmer months, typically from May to October, when temperatures are consistently above freezing.

faq.question: How much does asphalt paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of asphalt paving varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. Contact us for a free estimate tailored to your specific needs.

services.name: Concrete Paving
services.shortDescription: Durable and versatile concrete paving for patios, walkways, and decorative surfaces.
services.description:
Concrete paving offers a durable and versatile solution for creating beautiful and functional outdoor spaces. Buckeye Surface Maintenance specializes in designing and installing custom concrete patios, walkways, driveways, and other decorative surfaces throughout Cleveland. We understand the importance of proper mixing, pouring, and curing techniques to ensure the longevity and structural integrity of your concrete paving.

Our team has extensive experience working with various concrete finishes, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete. We can help you choose the perfect style and design to complement your home's architecture and landscaping. Whether you're looking to create a welcoming front walkway in University Circle or a spacious backyard patio in Detroit Shoreway, we can bring your vision to life.

We take pride in our attention to detail and commitment to quality craftsmanship. We use only the highest-grade concrete mixes and employ proven techniques to prevent cracking, settling, and other common issues. We also offer concrete sealing services to protect your investment from the elements and extend its lifespan.

faq.question: What are the advantages of concrete paving over asphalt?
faq.answer: Concrete paving offers greater design flexibility and can be customized with various colors, patterns, and textures. It also tends to be more durable and requires less maintenance than asphalt.

faq.question: How long does concrete paving take to cure?
faq.answer: Concrete paving typically takes 7-10 days to fully cure, depending on weather conditions. We will provide specific instructions on how to care for your new concrete during the curing process.

faq.question: Can concrete paving be repaired if it cracks?
faq.answer: Yes, concrete paving can be repaired if it cracks. We offer concrete repair services to address cracks, chips, and other damage.

services.name: Sealcoating
services.shortDescription: Protect your asphalt investment with professional sealcoating services.
services.description:
Sealcoating is a crucial maintenance step for extending the life of your asphalt pavement. Buckeye Surface Maintenance offers professional sealcoating services that protect your driveway or parking lot from the damaging effects of weather, traffic, and chemicals. In Cleveland, the freeze-thaw cycle can wreak havoc on asphalt, causing cracks, potholes, and deterioration. Sealcoating creates a protective barrier that prevents water from penetrating the asphalt and causing further damage.

Our sealcoating process involves thoroughly cleaning the asphalt surface, filling any cracks or imperfections, and applying a high-quality sealant. We use only the best sealcoating products that are specifically designed to withstand Cleveland's harsh climate. Our experienced team ensures even application and proper curing for optimal protection and longevity.

Regular sealcoating not only protects your asphalt from damage but also enhances its appearance, giving it a fresh, black look. It also helps to prevent oxidation and fading, keeping your pavement looking its best for years to come. We recommend sealcoating your asphalt every 2-3 years to maintain its integrity and extend its lifespan.

faq.question: How often should I sealcoat my asphalt?
faq.answer: We recommend sealcoating your asphalt every 2-3 years to maintain its integrity and extend its lifespan.

faq.question: How long does sealcoating take to dry?
faq.answer: Sealcoating typically takes 24-48 hours to dry completely, depending on weather conditions. We will advise you on the best time to apply sealcoating based on the forecast.

faq.question: Can I sealcoat my asphalt myself?
faq.answer: While it is possible to DIY sealcoating, professional application ensures proper preparation, even coverage, and optimal results. Our experienced team has the equipment and expertise to get the job done right.

services.name: Asphalt Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert asphalt repair services to fix potholes, cracks, and other damage.
services.description:
Don't let potholes and cracks ruin your asphalt pavement. Buckeye Surface Maintenance offers expert asphalt repair services to fix damage and restore the integrity of your driveway or parking lot. Cleveland's harsh winters and heavy traffic can cause significant damage to asphalt surfaces, leading to safety hazards and costly repairs if left unaddressed.

Our asphalt repair services include pothole filling, crack sealing, patching, and resurfacing. We use high-quality asphalt mixes and proven repair techniques to ensure lasting results. Whether you have a small pothole on your driveway in Tremont or extensive cracking on your commercial parking lot in Ohio City, we have the expertise and equipment to handle the job.

We understand the importance of prompt and efficient asphalt repair to prevent further damage and ensure the safety of your property. Our team responds quickly to service requests and works diligently to complete repairs on time and within budget. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly repairs in the future.

faq.question: How quickly can you repair potholes?
faq.answer: We understand the urgency of pothole repair and strive to respond quickly to service requests. We can typically repair potholes within 24-48 hours of receiving your request.

faq.question: What is the best way to prevent asphalt damage?
faq.answer: Regular sealcoating, proper drainage, and prompt repair of cracks and potholes are essential for preventing asphalt damage.

faq.question: How much does asphalt repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of asphalt repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the type of repair required. Contact us for a free estimate tailored to your specific needs.

services.name: Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: Create a welcoming entrance with our expert driveway paving services.
services.description:
Your driveway is the first impression people have of your home. Buckeye Surface Maintenance specializes in creating beautiful and durable driveways that enhance the curb appeal and value of your property. We offer a wide range of driveway paving options, including asphalt, concrete, and paver stones, to suit your style and budget.

Whether you're looking for a classic asphalt driveway or a decorative concrete driveway with stamped patterns, we can bring your vision to life. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring proper grading, drainage, and compaction for a long-lasting and aesthetically pleasing result. Our team has extensive experience working with various driveway designs and materials, and we can help you choose the perfect option to complement your home's architecture and landscaping.

We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your daily routine during driveway paving projects. Our team works efficiently and effectively to complete projects on time and within budget. We also take pride in our clean and professional work sites, leaving your property looking its best.

faq.question: What is the best material for driveway paving in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Asphalt is a popular and cost-effective option for driveway paving in Cleveland due to its durability and ability to withstand our harsh winters. Concrete and paver stones are also excellent choices for those seeking a more decorative look.

faq.question: How long does driveway paving take?
faq.answer: The duration of driveway paving depends on the size and complexity of the project. A typical driveway paving project can take 1-3 days to complete.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for driveway paving?
faq.answer: Permit requirements for driveway paving vary depending on your location. We can help you determine whether a permit is required and assist with the application process.

services.name: Parking Lot Paving
services.shortDescription: Reliable parking lot paving services for businesses of all sizes.
services.description:
A well-maintained parking lot is essential for attracting customers and ensuring the safety of your employees. Buckeye Surface Maintenance offers reliable parking lot paving services for businesses of all sizes in Cleveland and surrounding areas. We understand the importance of proper design, construction, and maintenance to create a durable and functional parking lot that meets your specific needs.

Our parking lot paving services include new construction, resurfacing, repairs, and sealcoating. We use high-quality asphalt and concrete mixes that are specifically designed to withstand heavy traffic and Cleveland's harsh weather conditions. Our experienced team ensures proper grading, drainage, and compaction to prevent cracking, potholes, and other common issues.

We work closely with our clients to develop customized parking lot paving solutions that meet their budget and timeline. We also offer parking lot striping and marking services to ensure proper traffic flow and compliance with local regulations. Whether you need a new parking lot for your retail store in Detroit Shoreway or a resurfacing project for your office building in University Circle, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done right.

faq.question: What are the key considerations for parking lot paving?
faq.answer: Key considerations for parking lot paving include traffic volume, soil conditions, drainage, and local regulations. We take all of these factors into account when designing and constructing parking lots.

faq.question: How often should I resurface my parking lot?
faq.answer: The frequency of parking lot resurfacing depends on traffic volume and weather conditions. A typical parking lot may need resurfacing every 10-15 years.

faq.question: Do I need to stripe my parking lot?
faq.answer: Yes, parking lot striping is essential for ensuring proper traffic flow, maximizing parking space, and complying with local regulations.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Buckeye Surface Maintenance did an amazing job on our new driveway! The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product is beautiful. We get compliments on it all the time. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We had several large potholes in our parking lot, and Buckeye Surface Maintenance came out and fixed them quickly and effectively. The price was fair, and the work seems very solid. Would use them again.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: Buckeye Surface Maintenance sealcoated our driveway, and it looks brand new! They were very thorough and paid attention to detail. The sealant looks great and should protect the asphalt for years to come.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: The concrete patio that Buckeye Surface Maintenance installed is stunning! The stamped concrete pattern is exactly what we wanted, and the quality of the work is excellent. They were very helpful in the design process and made sure we were happy with every detail.

reviews.name: Jessica R.
reviews.text: Buckeye Surface Maintenance repaved our entire parking lot. It was a big project, but they completed it on time and within budget. The new asphalt is smooth and even, and the parking lot looks much more professional now.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: From start to finish, Buckeye Surface Maintenance was a pleasure to work with. They communicated clearly throughout the project, and the asphalt paving they did for our new warehouse is top-notch. Highly recommend them for any commercial paving needs.
